case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF., vs. RANGER INS., CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF. AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INS., CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS
REIMBURSEMENT FOR FILING RE-6103.5 GOV.CODE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INS., CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF.
